title: Site Finance Controller NWE
required_skills: Degree in Finance, Business Administration or similar
Extensive experience in manufacturing or audit
Leadership skills (lead and develop site finance team)
matched_skills: Excel and PowerPoint: confirmed tool proficiency across multiple roles
Analytical skills: budget variance analysis and financial reporting at HSBC
Budget tracking: USD 8M programme financial governance at HSBC (partial proxy for budgeting)
missing_skills: Manufacturing or audit sector experience (no manufacturing background)
Site finance controlling or P&L ownership
German native speaker (candidate is B1, not native — hard gate)
Accounting qualification or finance degree specialisation
core_responsibilities: Lead monthly close, forecasting, and annual budgeting processes
Prepare and analyse site P&L, KPIs, and financial performance
Act as finance business partner to site management
Ensure statutory, IFRS, tax, and legal compliance
Manage CAPEX projects and ROI analysis
Lead and develop the site finance team
recommended_emphasis: This role is a poor match — application is not recommended
German native speaker is a hard requirement; B1 German disqualifies the candidate
Manufacturing finance controlling is a specialised discipline requiring domain experience the candidate lacks
IFRS, CAPEX, and P&L ownership are core skills absent from the CV
summary: Match score 12.5% — poor match. This is a specialist finance controller role requiring manufacturing sector experience, IFRS compliance expertise, team leadership, and native German. The candidate has programme budget tracking experience at HSBC but lacks the technical accounting, manufacturing domain, and language requirements. Application is not recommended.
